sentences.en: Let's check the mirror, is your shirt on straight?
sentences.zh: 照一下鏡子，你的衣服穿正了嗎？
sentences.ipa: /lets tʃek ðə ˈmɪrɚ ɪz jʊɚ ʃɝt ɑn stret/

sentences.en: Take small bites so you don't choke.
sentences.zh: 小口小口吃，才不會噎到。
sentences.ipa: /tek smɔl baɪts so ju dont tʃok/

sentences.en: Let's turn off the lights and get cozy.
sentences.zh: 我們關燈，舒服地窩著吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets tɝn ɔf ðə laɪts ənd ɡet ˈkozi/

sentences.en: Let's find a good spot for a picnic.
sentences.zh: 我們找個好地方野餐吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets faɪnd ə ɡʊd spɑt fɔr ə ˈpɪknɪk/

sentences.en: Be gentle, that's a smaller kid than you.
sentences.zh: 溫柔一點，那個小朋友比你小。
sentences.ipa: /bi ˈdʒentl ðæts ə ˈsmɔlɚ kɪd ðæn ju/

sentences.en: Who's your teacher this semester?
sentences.zh: 這學期你的老師是誰？
sentences.ipa: /huz jʊɚ ˈtitʃɚ ðɪs sɪˈmestɚ/

sentences.en: Can you explain that answer in your own words?
sentences.zh: 你可以用自己的話解釋這個答案嗎？
sentences.ipa: /kæn ju ɪkˈsplen ðæt ˈænsɚ ɪn jʊɚ on wɝdz/

sentences.en: Let's donate the toys you don't play with.
sentences.zh: 我們把不玩的玩具捐出去吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets doˈnet ðə tɔɪz ju dont ple wɪð/

sentences.en: It's normal to feel nervous before something new.
sentences.zh: 面對新事物感到緊張是正常的。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts ˈnɔrməl tu fil ˈnɝvəs bɪˈfɔr ˈsʌmθɪŋ nu/

sentences.en: Let's try that again, more calmly this time.
sentences.zh: 我們再試一次，這次要冷靜一點。
sentences.ipa: /lets traɪ ðæt əˈɡen mɔr ˈkɑmli ðɪs taɪm/

sentences.en: I noticed you helped your friend, that's so kind.
sentences.zh: 我注意到你幫了朋友，真貼心。
sentences.ipa: /aɪ ˈnotɪst ju helpt jʊɚ frend ðæts so kaɪnd/

sentences.en: Always ask an adult before you go swimming.
sentences.zh: 去游泳前一定要先問大人。
sentences.ipa: /ˈɔlwez æsk ən əˈdʌlt bɪˈfɔr ju ɡo ˈswɪmɪŋ/

sentences.en: Let's rest at home today since you're coughing.
sentences.zh: 你在咳嗽，今天在家休息吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets rest æt hom təˈde sɪns jʊɚ ˈkɔfɪŋ/

sentences.en: Show Grandma the picture you drew.
sentences.zh: 把你畫的畫拿給奶奶看。
sentences.ipa: /ʃo ˈɡrænmɑ ðə ˈpɪktʃɚ ju dru/

sentences.en: Let's invite your classmate for a playdate.
sentences.zh: 我們邀請你的同學來玩吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets ɪnˈvaɪt jʊɚ ˈklæsmet fɔr ə ˈpledet/

sentences.en: Say 'you're welcome' when someone thanks you.
sentences.zh: 有人謝謝你的時候要說「不客氣」。
sentences.ipa: /se jʊr ˈwelkəm wen ˈsʌmwʌn θæŋks ju/

sentences.en: Roll up your sleeves, it's getting warm.
sentences.zh: 把袖子捲起來，天氣變暖了。
sentences.ipa: /rol ʌp jʊɚ slivz ɪts ˈɡetɪŋ wɔrm/

sentences.en: No screens thirty minutes before bedtime.
sentences.zh: 睡前三十分鐘不能用螢幕。
sentences.ipa: /no skrinz ˈθɝti ˈmɪnəts bɪˈfɔr ˈbedtaɪm/

sentences.en: Let's bake cookies for the holiday together.
sentences.zh: 我們一起烤節慶餅乾吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets bek ˈkʊkiz fɔr ðə ˈhɑlɪde təˈɡeðɚ/

sentences.en: Who's your favorite character in this book?
sentences.zh: 這本書裡你最喜歡誰？
sentences.ipa: /huz jʊɚ ˈfevɚɪt ˈkerəktɚ ɪn ðɪs bʊk/
